element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Double-jump, descent slowdown, platform creation over hazards
Required for aerial combat and boss encounters
Progressive stat increases tied to currency collection
Pepelogoo used as mobile platform over instant-death hazard
Companion defensive utility against environmental damage

element_introduction_order.element: Hidden life drops (150 total, +1 heart per 10)

typical_relief_triggers: Hub town safe zone between expeditions
Companion ability successful completion (descent slowdown, platform creation)
typical_tension_triggers: Monster encounters in temples and caverns
Point-of-no-return area locks after boss defeat
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical exploration-combat-upgrade loop with escalating elemental hazards; tension building through environmental complexity and boss encounters, relief through town hub and equipment progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden life drops (150 scattered) encourage thorough exploration of non-critical paths
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Elemental Spirits hidden within temples/caverns tied to thematic biomes (fire dragon in Dragon Village, ice wraith in Darkworld)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic sword combat and Pepelogoo mechanics in accessible terrain; emphasis on learning companion double-jump and descent control
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Environmental hazard complexity increases (lava geysers requiring platform mechanics, fire obstacles requiring fire-blowing); elemental-themed biomes introduce varied obstacle types
difficulty_curve.late_game: Frozen wasteland and swamp navigation add terrain-specific challenges; boss encounters require mastery of directional sword attacks combined with companion utility
notable_spikes: First major biome transition (Dragon Village fire hazards)
Lava geyser sequences requiring precise Pepelogoo platform management
Frozen Childam area with ice-based enemies and environmental damage
Elemental Spirit boss encounters requiring synchronized combat and companion abilities

notable_level_patterns.description: Four major areas (Begonia/Dragon Village, Childam/Darkworld, Lilypad/Dwarf Village, Alsedo/Fairy Village) each themed around an elemental spirit and environmental obstacle type; progression locked by boss defeat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Begonia (fire hazards, dragon lore), Childam (ice wasteland, wraith encounter)

notable_level_patterns.description: Central town hub serves as safe zone and equipment upgrade station; radial expeditions into temples and caverns that become permanently inaccessible after boss defeat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Hub town with Purapril XIII, shop, and save points

notable_level_patterns.description: Pepelogoo mechanics create skill gates: lava platforms require double-jump mastery, fire obstacles require fire-blowing ability unlock, falling rocks require positioning awareness
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Lava geyser corridor requiring sustained platform creation

notable_level_patterns.description: Mid-air sword directional attacks (up/down/forward) become essential in later encounters; aerial positioning tied to both enemy placement and environmental hazards
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Boss arenas with elevated platforms and airborne enemy patterns
